creator: justin@shiningsilence.com
text:
Checksum for downloaded RPM (needed for install) doesn't match what's in port.

Fix: 

make NO_CHECKSUM=yes install may work, though I haven't been successful yet.
How-To-Repeat: Download the i386 Linux RPM.  Place in /usr/ports/distfiles.  
cd /usr/ports/audio/linux-realplayer.  "make install" produces:

===>  Extracting for linux-realplayer-8.cs1
